## Problem

What problem or limitation does this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or API you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe alternatives, workarounds, or related tools you considered.

## Use case

Who would use this and how would it improve their workflow?

## Additional context

Add diagrams, screenshots, links, or examples if useful.
